chapter_title.ar: باب آخَرُ مِنْهُ فِي حِفْظِ الْمَالِ وَ كَرَاهَةِ الْإِضَاعَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 154 – Another chapter from it regarding protection of the wealth and abhorrence of the wastage

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/411)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/411)
text: سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ إِنَّ اللهَ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ يُبْغِضُ الْقِيلَ وَالْقَالَ وَإِضَاعَةَ الْمَالِ وَكَثْرَةَ السُّؤَالِ.

en.sarwar: 5. Al-Husayn from Muhammad has narrated from Mu’alla’ ibn Muhammad from al-Washsha’ who has said the following: “I once heard abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying, ‘Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, hates qil (it was said so), qal (he said so and so on . . .), wasting assets and asking a great deal of questions.’”
